functions.functionContentWithoutFormatting: { uint16_t oldOffsetTrim; float32_t newOffsetTrim; // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(referenceVoltage > 0.0F); // // Get the sign-extended offset trim value // oldOffsetTrim = (HWREGH(base + DAC_O_TRIM) & DAC_TRIM_OFFSET_TRIM_M); oldOffsetTrim = ((oldOffsetTrim & DAC_REG_BYTE_MASK) ^ 0x80U) - 0x80U; // // Calculate new offset trim value if DAC is operating at a reference // voltage other than 2.5v. // newOffsetTrim = ((2.5F / referenceVoltage) * (float32_t)oldOffsetTrim); // // Check if the new offset trim value is valid // ASSERT((newOffsetTrim > -129.0F) && (newOffsetTrim < 128.0F)); // // Set the new offset trim value // HWREGH(base + DAC_O_TRIM) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + DAC_O_TRIM) & ~DAC_TRIM_OFFSET_TRIM_M) | (uint16_t)newOffsetTrim); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get the revision value. // return(HWREGH(base + DAC_O_REV) & DAC_REV_REV_M); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the reference voltage // HWREGH(base + DAC_O_CTL) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + DAC_O_CTL) & ~DAC_CTL_DACREFSEL) | (uint16_t)source); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the gain mode // HWREGH(base + DAC_O_CTL) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + DAC_O_CTL) & ~DAC_CTL_MODE) | (uint16_t)mode); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the load mode // HWREGH(base + DAC_O_CTL) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + DAC_O_CTL) & ~DAC_CTL_LOADMODE) | (uint16_t)mode); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((pwmSignal > 0U) && (pwmSignal < 33U)); // // Set the PWM sync signal // HWREGH(base + DAC_O_CTL) = (uint16_t)((uint16_t)(HWREGH(base + DAC_O_CTL) & ~DAC_CTL_SYNCSEL_M) | ((uint16_t)(pwmSignal - 1U) << DAC_CTL_SYNCSEL_S)); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get the active value // return(HWREGH(base + DAC_O_VALA) & DAC_VALA_DACVALA_M); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(value <= DAC_VALS_DACVALS_M); // // Set the shadow value // HWREGH(base + DAC_O_VALS) = (uint16_t)((uint16_t)(HWREGH(base + DAC_O_VALS) & ~DAC_VALS_DACVALS_M) | (value & DAC_VALS_DACVALS_M)); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get the shadow value // return(HWREGH(base + DAC_O_VALS) & DAC_VALS_DACVALS_M); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Enable the output // HWREGH(base + DAC_O_OUTEN) |= DAC_OUTEN_DACOUTEN; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Disable the output // HWREGH(base + DAC_O_OUTEN) &= (uint16_t)(~DAC_OUTEN_DACOUTEN); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((offset > -129) && (offset < 128)); // // Set the offset trim value // HWREGH(base + DAC_O_TRIM) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + DAC_O_TRIM) & ~DAC_TRIM_OFFSET_TRIM_M) | (uint16_t)offset); }

{ uint16_t value; // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get the sign-extended offset trim value // value = (HWREGH(base + DAC_O_TRIM) & DAC_TRIM_OFFSET_TRIM_M); value = ((value & (uint16_t)DAC_REG_BYTE_MASK) ^ 0x80U) - 0x80U; return((int16_t)value); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((reg & ~(DAC_LOCK_CONTROL | DAC_LOCK_SHADOW | DAC_LOCK_OUTPUT)) == 0U); // // Lock the specified registers // HWREGH(base + DAC_O_LOCK) |= (DAC_LOCK_KEY | reg); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(DAC_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT((reg & ~(DAC_LOCK_CONTROL | DAC_LOCK_SHADOW | DAC_LOCK_OUTPUT)) == 0U); // // Return the lock status on the specified registers // return(((HWREGH(base + DAC_O_LOCK) & reg) != 0U)); }
